title: Failure to resolve nested type parameters

features.name: parameterized class typedef member accessed via scope resolution in type parameter
features.description: Code should include a parameterized class where a typedef member is accessed using :: scope resolution operator and passed directly as a type parameter to another class instantiation

features.name: two-step typedef workaround for nested type resolution
features.description: Code should include a workaround where a parameterized class type is first assigned to a typedef, then the typedef is used to access a member via :: scope resolution

features.name: parameterized class type as module port or variable
features.description: Code should include using a parameterized class typedef member via :: directly as a variable type or module port type
